messages: Wishing you a day full of success!
Your dedication makes a difference every day.
Today is a great day to help your patients!
Your work transforms lives. Keep going!
Let's start this day with positive energy!
Every patient is an opportunity to do good.
Your expertise and care are invaluable.
May it be a productive and fulfilling day!
Your commitment inspires the whole team.
Today will be an excellent day in medicine!

landing.heroSubtitle: Record your consultations, and let artificial intelligence generate detailed medical and patient reports automatically. Save time and improve documentation quality.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need for better medical documentation
landing.feature1Desc: Simply record your consultation and our AI handles the rest. No typing required.
landing.feature2Desc: Automatically generates both a detailed medical report and a patient-friendly summary.
landing.feature3Desc: Built-in digital consent workflow so patients can review and approve their reports.
landing.feature4Desc: Send patient reports directly via WhatsApp with a single click.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join doctors who are saving hours every week on medical documentation.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Use — IMI Health
terms.s1p1: By registering as a doctor on the IMI Health platform, you declare that you have read, understood and fully accepted these Terms and Conditions of Use. If you do not agree with any of the provisions herein, you must refrain from using the platform.
terms.s1p2: These Terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you ("the Doctor") and IMI Health S.A.S. ("the Company", "we"). The use of any service offered by the platform implies full and irrevocable acceptance of these Terms.
terms.s2p1: IMI Health is a digital platform for AI-powered medical documentation that enables registered doctors to record consultations, generate medical and patient reports automatically, and manage their patients' health records.
terms.s2p2: The Company provides the necessary technological infrastructure (web administration panel, AI transcription and report generation) under the conditions agreed in the contracted plan.
terms.s3p1: As a registered doctor, you commit to:
terms.s3li1: Provide truthful, accurate and up-to-date information during registration and in all subsequent communications.
terms.s3li2: Maintain the confidentiality of your access credentials to the administration panel.
terms.s3li3: Immediately notify the Company of any unauthorized use of your account.
terms.s3li4: Comply with all applicable legislation on personal data protection, telemedicine and patient rights.
terms.s3li5: Not use the platform for unlawful, fraudulent or rights-infringing activities.
terms.s3li6: Obtain explicit patient consent before recording and processing any medical consultation.
terms.s4p1: The Company collects and processes personal data of platform users in accordance with its Privacy Policy, which forms an integral part of these Terms. By accepting these Terms, you also accept the Privacy Policy.
terms.s4p2: The Doctor, in their role as data controller with respect to their patients' data, must ensure a valid legal basis for processing such data and respect the rights of access, rectification, erasure and objection recognised by applicable regulations.
terms.s5p1: IMI Health services are offered under different subscription plans. The contracted plan will determine the available features, the active patient limit and the applicable commercial conditions.
terms.s5p2: In case of non-payment, the Company may suspend access to the platform with 72 hours prior notice. Late payment will accrue default interest equivalent to the active rate of Banco de la Nación Argentina.
terms.s6p1: All intellectual property rights over the IMI Health platform, including but not limited to its source code, design, logos, trademarks and documentation, are the exclusive property of the Company or its licensors. Reproduction, distribution, modification or any other unauthorised use is strictly prohibited.
terms.s7p1: The Company shall not be liable for direct, indirect, incidental, special or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the platform, including loss of profits, data or commercial goodwill, even if it has been warned of the possibility of such damages.
terms.s7p2: The platform is provided "as is". The Company does not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free or completely secure.
terms.s8p1: The Company reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be communicated with at least 15 days' notice by email and/or via a prominent notice in the administration panel.
terms.s9p1: Any dispute arising from the interpretation, application or breach of these Terms shall be submitted to the jurisdiction of the Ordinary Courts of the Autonomous City of Buenos Aires, with both parties waiving any other jurisdiction that may apply.
terms.s10p1: For inquiries, claims or notifications related to these Terms, you can contact us at
terms.s10p2: or in writing to our office located in the Autonomous City of Buenos Aires, Argentina.

manifest.title: IMI Health Manifest
manifest.subtitle: The medical report is not a procedure. It is a clinical act.
manifest.description: It is the synthesis of reasoning, responsibility, and professional experience.
manifest.historyTitle: For decades, the report was plain text.
manifest.beliefTitle: We believe it can be better.
principles: Be useful beyond the moment of issuance.
manifest.doctorFocusTitle: The doctor should not waste time on repetitive tasks.
manifest.doctorFocusDescription: They should focus on thinking, deciding, and caring.
manifest.technologyTitle: Technology does not replace clinical judgment.
manifest.technologyDescription: It organizes it. It protects it. It enhances it.
manifest.imiTitle: An Intelligent Medical Report (IMI Health) does not decide for the doctor.
manifest.imiDescription: It gives better tools to practice with precision.
manifest.conclusion1: IMI Health does not automate medicine.
manifest.finalStatement: Because the future of medicine is not less human.
manifest.finalConclusion: It is clearer, safer, and more intelligent.
